# Copilot Instructions

Read `../AGENTS.md` first. This repository uses root and directory-scoped `AGENTS.md` files plus `.claude/rules/*` files with `paths` metadata as the shared instruction system.

Do not duplicate rule content here. If a durable instruction is missing, add it to the smallest scoped `AGENTS.md` file or `.claude/rules/*` file and keep this file as a compatibility pointer.
